message:
fix(export): eliminate export path/status race in detail modal (#80)

When the export modal was opened before detail data finished loading,
the initial export state was built with incomplete metadata (0 messages,
"Unknown date" timestamp, and a filename derived from missing info).
Once the detail data loaded asynchronously, the modal's metadata was
never refreshed, causing the displayed filename, message count, and
timestamp to remain stale.

Additionally, under concurrent file-collision scenarios, the
write_export_bytes_no_overwrite function could enter an infinite loop
when unique_filename returned the same candidate path repeatedly within
the same second. The Markdown export path also bypassed the
unique_filename deduplication entirely.

Changes:

- Add refresh_open_export_modal_for_hit() to CassApp that updates an
  already-open export modal's metadata (agent name, workspace, timestamp,
  message count, title, filename preview) when detail data arrives,
  while preserving user-toggled export options

- Call refresh on DetailLoadRequested when the loaded source_path
  matches the current detail hit, so the modal reflects accurate data

- Fix Markdown export path in build_export_lines to use
  unique_filename() instead of a bare directory join, preventing
  potential overwrites of existing Markdown files

- Fix write_export_bytes_no_overwrite collision loop: when
  unique_filename returns the same candidate (possible within the same
  second), force forward progress with a retry-counter suffix to
  guarantee the loop terminates

- Clean up partial writes on failure by removing the file if
  write_all errors after create_new succeeds

- Apply unique_filename to the initial filename preview in
  ExportModalState::from_hit so the preview reflects an available
  filename from the start

- Minor formatting: remove unnecessary format!() wrapping a string
  literal in query.rs browse_messages, and reformat a long
  stable_hit_hash call to fit on one line

- Bump crate version to 0.2.1

- Add test detail_load_refreshes_open_export_modal_metadata_from_cached_detail
  verifying that loading detail data updates an already-open export
  modal's message_count and timestamp

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
